code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has_digit = false
mut in_sign = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    else if b == 45 and not has_digit and not in_sign
      sign = -1
      in_sign = true
    else if b == 43 and not has_digit and not in_sign
      in_sign = true
    else
      if has_digit
        sum = sum + sign * cur
        count = count + 1
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      has_digit = false
      in_sign = false
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has_digit
  sum = sum + sign * cur
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
